title: Entity Content Perspective — Mutable
description: Schema for boardroom/mind/{agent_id}/Manas/content/{entity}.jsonld. The content perspective holds the agent's mutable, evolving signals about a shared entity (company or product). It captures the agent's current interpretation, active software interfaces, and live signals — updated as the agent accumulates experience.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI for the entity type

@id.description: Entity identifier, e.g. asi:saga or bi:product:core

@type.description: Entity type, e.g. SagaEntity or SoftwareProduct

agent_perspective.description: Agent identifier this perspective belongs to, e.g. agent:ceo

legend.description: Legend name for this agent, e.g. Steve Jobs

perspective.description: Agent's active interpretive lens on this entity

software_interfaces.description: Active software tools and interfaces the agent uses to interact with this entity

current_signals.description: Live signals and observations the agent is tracking about this entity
